comment: DNA stack table shifted by +0.115 kcal/mol per stack to approximate folding at [Na+] = 0.05 M (Owczarzy 2004 Biochemistry 43:3537-3554). Only `stack` is overridden; every other sub-table falls back to the native-dna defaults via the ParameterSet override channel.
name: dna-low-salt-50mM-Na
